title: Anika Kitchen Dish Drainer & Drying Rack/Removable Drip Tray & Cutlery Holder/Large Capacity for Kitchen Counter in Grey 69069
features: LARGE CAPACITY KITCHEN DISH DRAINER – This kitchen dish drainer rack will provide all the space you need to dry dries up to 10 plates plus mugs & bowls, ideal for family kitchens.
REMOVABLE DRIP TRAY – The removable drip tray that sits at the base of this dish drainer catches water and protects worktops; and is removable for easy one-wipe cleaning.
SEPARATE CUTLERY HOLDER – The dish drainer rack measures 41cm x 32cm x 9.5cm, and features a separate cutlery holder which keeps knives, forks & spoons upright and speeds drying.
STYLISH GREY DESIGN – This dish rack drainer with tray comes in a stylish grey colour that will not look out of place in either a modern or traditional styled kitchen.
ANIKA – Anika is the leading manufacturer of homeware, bathroom and kitchen essentials. View the Anika store on Amazon to view the whole range today.
description: Product Description Previous page Drip Tray Collects excess water, preventing spills and protecting your draining board & worktop. Large Capacity Provides excellent support for plates, bowls, mugs, and utensils—ideal for small and busy kitchens. Cutlery Holder Keep cutlery & utensils neatly separated, promoting faster drying and better hygiene. Next page 1 Drip Tray 2 Large Capacity 3 Cutlery Holder

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Lightweight, Removable Cutlery Basket, Removable Drip Tray, Rust Resistant, Slip Resistant
